abilities.name: levitate
abilities.effect: This Pokémon is immune to Ground-type moves, Spikes, Toxic Spikes, and Arena Trap. This ability is disabled during Gravity or Ingrain, or while holding an Iron Ball. This ability is not disabled during Roost.
abilities.flavorText: By floating in the air, the Pokémon receives full immunity to all Ground-type moves.

abilities.name: neutralizing-gas
abilities.shortEffect: Neutralizes abilities of all Pokémon in battle.
abilities.effect: While the Pokémon is in the battle, the effects of all other Pokémon’s Abilities will be nullified or will not be triggered.
abilities.flavorText: While the Pokémon is in the battle, the effects of all other Pokémon's Abilities will be nullified or will not be triggered.

abilities.name: stench
abilities.shortEffect: Has a 10% chance of making target Pokémon flinch with each hit.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon's damaging moves have a 10% chance to make the target flinch with each hit if they do not already cause flinching as a secondary effect. This ability does not stack with a held item. Overworld: The wild encounter rate is halved while this Pokémon is first in the party.
abilities.flavorText: By releasing a stench when attacking, the Pokémon may cause the target to flinch.
